notes: New product at time of study; combined GUI workflow model for warehouse design/construction/maintenance; absorbed into Ardent DataStage
Metadata directory for technical and business users; CDIF integration with CASE tools; absorbed into Ardent/Informix/IBM
Data warehouse implementation methodology based on 250 engagements; ~30 modules; superseded by agile DW practices
Java/HTML views of metadata for browser-enabled users; $2500 for 5 concurrent seats; early web BI capability
Business user personal data mart tool; point-and-click interface; precursor to modern self-service BI
Data warehouse architecture central to study; matured into modern data platforms cloud data warehouses (Snowflake Redshift BigQuery)
Departmental data marts proliferating in 1997; became standard BI delivery pattern; modern equivalent is data lakehouse subject areas
Aberdeen identifies metadata as the key to DW scalability; modern data catalogs (Collibra Alation Atlan) validate this insight
Prism planned CORBA integration for metadata distribution; CORBA was superseded by web services then REST
Prism planned DCOM integration alongside CORBA; both superseded
CDIF used for metadata exchange between Prism and CASE tools/repositories; deprecated as standards evolved
Prism feature for reusing mappings tables user exits; concept evolved into modern ETL reusable transformation patterns
The ETL paradigm Prism implements became the standard data integration pattern; evolved to ELT for cloud
2-week on-site consulting and training program for Iterations methodology; absorbed into Ardent/Informix services
